title: Application Development Intern
description: Completed a 500-hour Application Developer internship focused on full-stack web development, application maintenance, and system enhancement. Contributed to the development of applications used in daily operations, helping improve efficiency and reduce support tickets. Assisted in revamping legacy systems and enhancing existing web applications to optimize user experience and streamline workflows. Supported both front-end and back-end development, including building a new application with enhanced features using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, .NET, and MS SQL while adapting to modern development practices and expanding technical skills.

title: BS Information Technology
description: Pursuing a Bachelor of Science in Information Technology. Engaged in coursework spanning algorithms, database systems, web development, software development, systems design, and system architecture. Actively involved in student leadership as a member of the college student council, alongside academic studies, contributing to organizational and collaborative initiatives within the academic community.

title: Agent-In Customer Service 2
description: Worked as a Customer Service Representative handling inbound chats and calls to resolve customer concerns related to online and in-store purchases. Managed multiple tasks simultaneously by addressing customer issues while completing accurate real-time documentation using various support tools. Resolved concerns within an average handling time of five to six minutes per contact while maintaining service quality and accuracy. Consistently met performance targets by maximizing available resources to improve efficiency and deliver high levels of customer satisfaction.

title: Hello, World!
description: Every trainer has their starter Pokemon — mine was a blinking cursor and a blank screen (also a blank sheet of yellow paper). Writing that first line of code sparked a curiosity that never left. From a simple print statement, an entire world opened up. This moment set the foundation for everything that came after.
